notes: Stub and short-window harness artifacts cannot be mistaken for long-run evidence. Negative runtime measurements, duplicate persistent-runtime cycle identities, and observed-duration claims for bounded stubs fail closed. Actual repeated scheduled runtime evidence, long-run PAPER/SHADOW profitability evidence, and external live-review evidence remain missing; live readiness and scale-up stay blocked.
current_safe_progress: Persistent SHADOW runtime stubs now require distinct cycle commit identities and explicit duration evidence role. Any observed wall-clock runtime or LONG_RUN_EVIDENCE duration claim blocks as ACTUAL_PERSISTENT_RUNTIME_EXECUTION_MISSING.
